--- 文件: core/turn_builder.py (第 170 至 351 行，共 351 行) ---
 170 |                 break
 171 |             turn_messages.append(candidate)
 172 |             if candidate.get("tool_call_id"):
 173 |                 orphan_ids.append(candidate.get("tool_call_id"))
 174 |             j += 1
 175 | 
 176 |         turn = self._new_turn(
 177 |             turn_index=0,
 178 |             start_index=tool_index,
 179 |             end_index=j - 1,
 180 |             messages=turn_messages,
 181 |             is_tool_pair_complete=False,
 182 |             orphan_tool_call_ids=sorted(set(orphan_ids)),
 183 |         )
 184 |         return turn, j
 185 | 
 186 |     def _new_turn(
 187 |         self,
 188 |         turn_index: int,
 189 |         start_index: int,
 190 |         end_index: int,
 191 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 192 |         is_tool_pair_complete: bool = True,
 193 |         missing_tool_call_ids: Optional[List[str]] = None,
 194 |         orphan_tool_call_ids: Optional[List[str]] = None,
 195 |     ) -> ConversationTurn:
 196 |         user_message = next((msg for msg in messages if msg.get("role") == "user"), None)
 197 |         assistant_messages = [msg for msg in messages if msg.get("role") == "assistant"]
 198 |         tool_messages = [msg for msg in messages if msg.get("role") == "tool"]
 199 |         has_tool_calls = any(msg.get("role") == "assistant" and msg.get("tool_calls") for msg in messages)
 200 | 
 201 |         categories = self._categorize(messages)
 202 |         files_touched = self._extract_files(messages)
 203 |         errors = self._extract_matching_lines(messages, self.ERROR_KEYWORDS)
 204 |         tests = self._extract_matching_lines(messages, self.TEST_KEYWORDS)
 205 |         token_estimate = self._estimate_tokens(messages)
 206 |         importance = self._estimate_importance(
 207 |             messages,
 208 |             categories,
 209 |             is_tool_pair_complete,
 210 |             token_estimate,
 211 |             files_touched,
 212 |             errors,
 213 |             tests,
 214 |         )
 215 |         return ConversationTurn(
 216 |             id=f"turn_{start_index}_{end_index}_{turn_index}",
 217 |             start_index=start_index,
 218 |             end_index=end_index,
 219 |             messages=[dict(msg) for msg in messages],
 220 |             user_message=dict(user_message) if user_message else None,
 221 |             assistant_messages=[dict(msg) for msg in assistant_messages],
 222 |             tool_messages=[dict(msg) for msg in tool_messages],
 223 |             has_tool_calls=has_tool_calls,
 224 |             is_tool_pair_complete=is_tool_pair_complete,
 225 |             missing_tool_call_ids=missing_tool_call_ids or [],
 226 |             orphan_tool_call_ids=orphan_tool_call_ids or [],
 227 |             token_estimate=token_estimate,
 228 |             importance=importance,
 229 |             categories=categories,
 230 |             files_touched=files_touched,
 231 |             errors=errors,
 232 |             tests=tests,
 233 |         )
 234 | 
 235 |     def _tool_call_ids(self, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> Set[str]:
 236 |         return {tc.get("id") for tc in message.get("tool_calls", []) if tc.get("id")}
 237 | 
 238 |     def _estimate_tokens(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
 239 |         # Lightweight approximation: four chars per token, minimum one token.
 240 |         return max(1, sum(len(str(msg)) for msg in messages) // 4)
 241 | 
 242 |     def _estimate_importance(
 243 |         self,
 244 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 245 |         categories: List[str],
 246 |         is_tool_pair_complete: bool,
 247 |         token_estimate: int,
 248 |         files_touched: List[str],
 249 |         errors: List[str],
 250 |         tests: List[str],
 251 |     ) -> float:
 252 |         score = 0.08
 253 |         text = self._messages_text(messages).lower()
 254 | 
 255 |        ...
